questions.question: Describe the key differences between a binary search tree (BST) and a full binary tree. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the properties of BSTs (e.g., ordering, tree structure) and how they differ from full binary trees

questions.question: What is the time complexity of performing an in-order traversal on a binary tree? Why?
questions.hint: Recall the definition of in-order traversal and how it affects the time complexity

questions.question: A binary tree with n nodes is represented as an array of size 2n. What is the maximum height of the tree? Explain your reasoning.
questions.hint: Use the properties of binary trees and the given representation to derive the height
